data.name: Motion Control Algorithm Development and Validation
RENet: Fault-Tolerant Motion Control for Quadruped Robots via Redundant Estimator Networks under Visual Collapse

data.description: RENet: Fault-Tolerant Motion Control for Quadruped Robots via Redundant Estimator Networks under Visual Collapse discusses Domain Randomization and Robust Training.
Domain Randomization and Robust Training is part of Motion Control Algorithm Development and Validation.
Domain Randomization and Robust Training uses Domain Randomization.
